candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; appears twice with identical values, representing total revenue.
This is a cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Represents financial income, not operating revenue.
Interest income, not operating revenue.
Net financial items, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Represents net income, not revenue.
Represents comprehensive income, not revenue.
Represents comprehensive income, not revenue.
Interest income from non-bank sources, not operating revenue.

variables.notes: Using the recurring top-line label 'Total Revenue' as the priority source for REVT; it appears twice with identical values, so both are listed as alternatives.

candidates.why: Core production input costs; component of COGS.
Alternative COGS representation, but missing in the most recent year; still a COGS-type line.
Adjustment to inventory; part of COGS calculation but not the main COGS line.
Direct costs but relatively small and project-specific; part of COGS but not the aggregate line.
Explicit aggregate COGS line summarizing direct costs; best single mapping for total COGS.
Looks like operating payroll (likely SG&A) rather than direct COGS payroll.
General operating/overhead; more SG&A than COGS.
Overhead-type cost, not direct COGS.
Overhead component, not pure COGS.
Label suggests materials cost but values are nan; still component-type, but aggregate COGS exists.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Net financial result, not COGS.
Non-operating, not COGS.
R&D expense, not COGS.
Balance sheet inventory, not an income statement expense line.
Capitalized R&D asset, not COGS.
Liability, not COGS.

variables.notes: Mapped COGS to the explicit aggregate line 'Cost of revenues/COGS', which consolidates the direct cost components.

candidates.why: Generic operating overhead bucket; likely part of SG&A though currently showing nan values.
Clear SG&A-type overhead expenses; strong SG&A component.
Additional SG&A-type overhead category; complements 'Other operating expenses'.
Explicit selling expenses, a classic SG&A component.
Operating income, not an expense; should not be included in SG&A components.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. SG&A is not presented as a single line but split across multiple overhead components. Selected: (1) 'Payroll expenses' as a major personnel SG&A cost (not in the candidate list but clearly overhead, not COGS); (2) 'Other operating expenses' and (3) 'Other Operating Expense' as broad operating overhead buckets; (4) 'Selling exp.' as explicit selling costs; and (5) 'Other Operating' as a generic overhead catch-all for earlier years. Excluded totals and non-expense items. Manual review recommended to confirm that 'Payroll expenses' is not part of COGS and that no dedicated SG&A total exists elsewhere. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll expenses

candidates.why: Generic R&D line but appears empty (nan) in preview; less informative than supplemental expense line.
Capitalized R&D (investment) rather than expensed R&D; not the target XRD expense measure.
Explicitly labeled R&D expenses; best representation of total R&D expense to use for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D; a non-cash expense related to R&D capitalization, but not the primary current-period R&D expense.
Alternative R&D label but appears empty; redundant given the detailed supplemental expense line.
Balance sheet asset of capitalized R&D, not period expense.
Gross capitalized R&D asset value, not period expense.
Accumulated amortization of capitalized R&D; balance sheet, not current expense.
Net capitalized R&D balance; not the income statement expense.

variables.notes: Using 'Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental' as the main R&D expense measure, as it clearly represents total R&D expenses for the period.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense specific to lease liabilities; a component of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line net of capitalized amounts; best overall measure of interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease-related interest; secondary component of interest expense.
Generic interest expense label but appears unused (nan); keep as fallback.
Interest income (positive), not expense; not preferred for XINT.
Net of interest income and expense; usable only if pure expense lines are missing.
Interest income from non-bank sources; not an expense.
Equity measure; unrelated to interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list favors pure interest expense: first the aggregate 'Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest', then specific lease-interest lines, then the generic 'Interest Expense' label, and finally 'Net interest income' as a last-resort fallback if no expense-only line is populated for a given year.

candidates.why: Label appears but values are nan; likely a header or unused subtotal. Less reliable than 'Total Equity'.
Component of equity rather than total equity; should not be used alone for BE.
Explicit total equity line with populated values; matches total shareholders' equity.
Represents total equity including any minority interests; equal to 'Total Equity' here, indicating no separate minority interest.
Total balance sheet; includes liabilities and equity, not suitable for BE.

variables.notes: Selected 'Total Equity' as BE because it is the clear total equity line with values. 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' has identical values, implying no separate minority interest; BE is therefore based on 'Total Equity' and MIB is set to 0.

candidates.why: Aggregates total equity and any minority interest; however, no separate minority interest line is reported and values equal 'Total Equity', implying MIB = 0.

variables.notes: No separate line for non-controlling/minority interests is reported. 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' equals 'Total Equity', indicating there is effectively no minority interest; thus MIB is set to 0 via an empty final_choice.
